title: What it actually looks like for a man of God to put down the phone
caption:
This isn't about a detox. It's not a digital sabbath. It's a war, and most men are losing it.

Four moves that actually work:

Tolerate the boredom. Silence is how He speaks. You can't hear anything over the noise you're generating.

Name what you're routing around. The phone is usually a detour from something hard. Name the thing. Then do that instead.

Replace, don't resist. White-knuckle discipline alone won't beat dopamine. You need something better in the slot.

Choose what shapes your mind. What you look at long enough looks like you. Be transformed by the renewing of your mind — Romans 12:2. Something is forming you. Make sure you picked it.

Send this to a brother who needs it.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #screentime #discipline #scripture #realmen
